message:
feat(core,svg): add generic type parameters to class diagram nodes (bd-9cy0)

Add support for generic type parameters on class diagram nodes:

1. IrClassNodeMeta gains `generics: Vec<String>` field for storing
   parsed type parameters (e.g., ["T"] for List~T~, ["K","V"] for
   Map~K,V~)

2. SVG renderer displays generics in class header as angle brackets
   (e.g., "List<T>", "Map<K, V>") when generics are non-empty

Parser extraction of ~T~ syntax from class names is deferred to
a follow-up (parser file currently reserved by another agent).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1108,6 +1108,9 @@ pub struct IrClassNodeMeta {
     pub methods: Vec<IrClassMember>,
     #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
     pub stereotype: Option<ClassStereotype>,
+    /// Generic type parameters, e.g. `["T"]` for `List~T~`, `["K","V"]` for `Map~K,V~`.
+    #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Vec::is_empty")]
+    pub generics: Vec<String>,
 }
 
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq, Eq, Default)]
